query: Are fillings covered under my dental plan?
answer:
| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Class II - Basic Services | Fillings, consisting of amalgam and composite resins on any given tooth surface | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
